IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO LEAD AND ENGAGE OUR COMMUNITY IN THE FIGHT AGAINST HUNGER.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO LEAD AND ENGAGE OUR COMMUNITY IN THE FIGHT AGAINST HUNGER.
IRS990.Desc: WELD FOOD BANK COLLECTS SURPLUS FOOD FROM FOOD PROCESSORS, FARMS, DISTRIBUTORS, AND SUPERMARKETS. WE ALSO CONDUCT COMMUNITY FOOD DRIVES AND GLEAN FROM LOCAL GARDENS AND FARMS. THIS FOOD IS THEN DISTRIBUTED TO MORE THAN 73 NONPROFIT AGENCIES IN WELD COUNTY THAT PROVIDE MEALS AND SERVICES TO PEOPLE IN NEED. THE DIVERSITY OF OUR AGENCIES INCLUDES FOOD PANTRIES, HOMELESS SHELTERS, SOUP KITCHENS, RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT CENTERS, AND SENIOR AND YOUTH PROGRAMS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THIS IS THE FIRST YEAR FOR WHICH THE FOOD BANK SECTION 501(H)ELECTION IS EFFECTIVE

TAX PENALTIES AND INTEREST, IF ANY, WOULD BE CLASSIFIED WITH INCOME TAX EXPENSES IN THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS. NO TAX PENALTIES OR INTEREST HAVE BEEN INCURRED OR ARE RECOGNIZED IN THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS. GENERALLY, THREE TAX YEARS REMAIN SUBJECT TO EXAMINATION BY TAX JURISDICTIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE D, PAGE 4, PART XI, LINE 2D
SCHEDULE D, PAGE 4, PART XII, LINE 2D
SCHEDULE I, PAGE 1, PART I, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE WELD FOOD BANK REQUIRES PARTNER AGENCIES TO COMPLY WITH THE FOLLOWING : HAVE A 501 C (3) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS WITH THE IRS; SERVE THE NEEDY, ILL, INFANTS/CHILDREN AND/OR ELDERLY; PROVIDE FOOD TO CLIENTS AT NO COST; HAVE DESIGNATED HOURS OF OPERATION; MUST NOT DISCRIMINATE; MUST HAVE ADEQUATE FACILITIES TO HANDLE FOOD; MUST AGREE TO BE MONITORED BY WELD FOOD BANK A FORMAL INSPECTION OF A PARTNER AGENCY BY WELD FOOD BANK TO ENSURE THAT RECORD KEEPING, SANITATION, DISTRIBUTION AND OTHER REQUIREMENTS ARE BEING MET.

PART II, LINE 1: IN ORDER TO REACH ALL 4,000 SQUARE MILES OF WELD COUNTY THE WELD FOOD BANK WORKS CLOSELY WITH PARTNER AGENCIES. WE CURRENTLY WORK WITH 73 DIFFERENT NONPROFIT AGENCY PARTNERS WHICH INCLUDE FOOD PANTRIES, HOMELESS SHELTERS, SOUP KITCHENS, RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT CENTERS, AND SENIOR AND YOUTH PROGRAMS. THE AMOUNT REPORTED ON SCHEDULE I, PART II, LINE 1 REPRESENTS THE SUPPORT WE PROVIDED TO OUR AGENCY PARTNERS DURING FISCAL YEAR ENDED JUNE 30, 2020. PART II G AND H: NONCASH ASSISTANCE IN THE FORM OF DONATED FOOD PRODUCTS WAS PROVIDED TO VARIOUS PARTNER AGENCIES. DONATED FOOD IS VALUED AT 1.79 PER POUND, AS PROVIDED BY FEEDING AMERICA BASED UPON AN ANNUAL INDEPENDENT STUDY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE M, PAGE 1, PART I, LINE 32B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DONATED FOOD IS PRIMARILY RECEIVED FROM FEEDING AMERICA, A NATIONAL FOOD BANK ASSOCIATION, AS WELL AS FROM THE FEDERAL CSFP AND TEFAP PROGRAMS.
PART I, LINE 19 - THE NUMBER IN COLUMN (B) IS THE NUMBER OF POUNDS CONTRIBUTED. THE NUMBER IN COLUMN (C) IS BASED ON FEEDING AMERICA'S PER- POUND CALCULATIONS TO VALUE THESE CONTRIBUTIONS.
THE FORM 990 WAS PRESENTED TO THE FINANCE COMMITTEE FOR APPROVAL PRIOR TO FILING.
THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS REGULARLY AND CONSISTENTLY MONITORS AND ENFORCES COMPLIANCE WITH THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY MONTHLY AT THEIR BOARD OF DIRECTOR'S MEETING.
THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS USED AN INDEPENDENT STUDY FOR THE AVERAGE PAY OF THEIR DEMOGRAPHIC TO DETERMINE THE AMOUNT OF PAY FOR THE ORGANIZATION'S OFFICERS AND KEY EMPLOYEES.
WELD FOOD BANK MAKES ITS 990 AVAILABLE ON ITS WEBSITE, WWW.WELDFOODBANK.ORG
FUNDRAISING COSTS DEDUCTED FROM INCOME 76,729 FUNDRAISING COSTS DEDUCTED FROM INCOME -76,729

AveragingAttachment.ExplanationTxt: THIS IS THE FIRST YEAR FOR WHICH THE FOOD BANK SECTION 501(H)ELECTION IS EFFECTIVE
